name: Superion (CentralSquare) Public Safety API
what_it_does: Superion (now CentralSquare) public safety REST API for Computer-Aided Dispatch (CAD), records management systems (RMS), and law enforcement data integration. Enables AI agents to manage CAD incident creation and unit dispatch for emergency response automation, handle RMS arrest and incident report data for law enforcement records management, access property and vehicle query integration for criminal justice information system lookups, retrieve analytics and performance reporting for public safety operations intelligence, manage court case and citation management for municipal court workflow automation, handle jail management and booking records for corrections administration, access fire records management and inspection data for fire department workflow, retrieve EMS patient care reports for emergency medical services compliance, manage 911 call analytics and demand forecasting for dispatch optimization, and integrate Superion with NCIC, state criminal justice information networks, and federal law enforcement data systems.
use_cases: Processing CAD incidents from dispatch automation agents
Managing RMS reports from law enforcement records agents
Querying criminal justice data from NCIC integration agents
Analyzing 911 demand from public safety planning agents
not_for: Commercial security without law enforcement integration
Non-public safety government without emergency services
Consumer applications without public safety agency affiliation
best_when: A municipal police department, sheriff's office, fire department, or county government using CentralSquare (formerly Superion) wanting AI agents to automate dispatch, records management, criminal justice data integration, and public safety analytics.
avoid_when: CJIS SECURITY POLICY COMPLIANCE: All automated access to criminal justice information through Superion/CentralSquare must comply with FBI CJIS Security Policy; AI agents accessing NCIC/criminal history data require agency-level CJIS compliance, personnel security checks, and audit logging. Personally Identifiable Information — automated access to arrest records, criminal history, and law enforcement data contains sensitive PII; inadvertent disclosure of non-public criminal justice records creates criminal justice information system violation and civil liability. 911 recording confidentiality — automated access to 911 recordings may be subject to state public safety communications confidentiality laws; verify state law on 911 recording access before automation. Automated dispatch decision-making — automated unit dispatch recommendations must support, not replace, telecommunicator judgment; fully automated dispatch without human oversight creates liability in emergency response failures.

auth.notes: Superion (CentralSquare) uses API key and OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Lake Mary, Florida HQ. Superion acquired by CentralSquare Technologies (2018). CentralSquare formed from merger of Superion, TriTech Software Systems, and Zuercher Technologies. PE-backed (Vista Equity Partners, Bain Capital). 8,000+ public safety agency customers. CAD, RMS, and municipal software. CJIS-compliant. Competes with Tyler Technologies, Motorola Solutions, and Hexagon Safety for public safety software.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — government enterprise contract required
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual government enterprise license; per-module public safety pricing
pricing.notes: Lake Mary, Florida. Vista Equity/Bain Capital PE. Superion merged into CentralSquare (2018). 8,000+ government agency customers. Public safety and municipal software. CJIS-compliant.

performance.rate_limits: Mission-critical SLA; CAD and dispatch have strict availability requirements

known_agent_gotchas: CJIS SECURITY POLICY MANDATORY: All AI agent access to criminal justice information requires FBI CJIS compliance including personnel security, audit logging, and encryption; CJIS non-compliant agents accessing criminal history or NCIC data create federal law enforcement data sharing violation

CentralSquare merger complexity — Superion merged with TriTech and Zuercher to form CentralSquare; verify which platform (Superion CAD, TriTech CAD, Zuercher CAD) applies to your agency — APIs differ across legacy platforms
No webhooks — CAD incident and RMS record events require polling; no native push for dispatch event or records update notifications in legacy Superion platform

Automated dispatch decision liability — automated unit recommendation or dispatch routing must support telecommunicator judgment, not replace it; autonomous dispatch decisions without human override create emergency response liability

Criminal history data sensitivity — automated access to criminal history and arrest records must implement minimum necessary access; inadvertent exposure of non-public criminal justice records creates CJIS violation and civil rights liability

Multi-agency data sharing — automated cross-agency data queries must respect information sharing agreements; automated queries that bypass agency data sharing boundaries create law enforcement information policy violation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public safety software. CJIS, FedRAMP, StateRAMP. API key/OAuth2. US. Criminal justice information and law enforcement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public safety. CJIS, FedRAMP, StateRAMP. API key/OAuth2. US. Criminal justice and law enforcement data.
